label: Sonoma Winery Table
description: Outdoor winery table setting. Aged stone or teak table, dappled afternoon light through olive trees, wine glasses, artisan bread. Ground: fine gravel or lush grass. Relaxed, unhurried California wine country atmosphere.

label: Marble Kitchen Counter
description: White marble kitchen counter beside a large window. Soft diffused morning light filtering through white linen curtains. Clean and serene. Props: sculptural glass vase, fresh garden flowers, linen napkin, small ceramic bowl.

label: Garden Path
description: A lush private garden with a gravel or stone path. Climbing roses and green foliage. Dappled light through tree canopy. Terracotta pavers or aged stone tile underfoot. The feeling of a well-loved European-California garden.

label: French Country Interior
description: Warm, lived-in interior room. Aged stone tile or terracotta hex floors. White-painted walls, sheer linen curtains. A vintage armchair or simple linen sofa. Soft morning window light. Intimate and quiet.

label: Farmer's Market
description: Outdoor farmer's market setting. Striped canvas awning overhead casting soft diffused light. Fresh produce, flowers in paper wrapping, and market baskets nearby. Warm but not golden-hour light. Candid, mid-motion atmosphere.

label: Outdoor Garden Table
description: An intimate outdoor dining setup in a lush private garden. Iron bistro chairs or a wooden table under dappled light. Fresh flowers in a simple vase. Linen napkins, ceramic plates. The feeling of a private Sunday lunch.
